name: Rubbermaid Brilliance Glass
bestFor: Meal prep, leftovers and airtight storage
summary: Airtight, stackable glass storage for everyday kitchen organization.
notIdeal: Large bulk storage or very tight budgets.

name: Pipishell Bamboo Drawer Organizer
summary: Expandable bamboo drawer storage with a warmer, more refined visual feel.
notIdeal: Very shallow drawers or users who prefer plastic inserts.

name: Rubbermaid Brilliance Pantry
bestFor: Dry goods, pasta, rice, flour and sugar
summary: Airtight pantry storage with clear visibility and strong shelf rhythm.
notIdeal: Tiny cabinets or people who prefer glass-only storage.
